assessment_objectives.objective: the developer of the system, system component, or system service is required to perform penetration testing per an organization-defined breadth.
the developer of the system, system component, or system service is required to perform penetration testing per an organization-defined depth.
the developer of the system, system component, or system service is required to perform penetration testing under organization-defined constraints.
the developer of the system, system component or system service is required to perform attack surface reviews.
